productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Grey T-shirt
description: Composition Grey polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed collar, buttoned chest placket, long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, vented hem and embroidered Big Ben logo on left chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Subtle and stylish, this grey polo T-shirt from united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The long sleeves coupled with the embroidered Big Ben logo on the left chest enhances your sophisticated look. The vented hem offers a comfortable fit, while the cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look. Model statistics The product is a size XL on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
